Title: Educational data mining and learning analytics for academic performance prediction
Abstract: This study reviews predictive analytics methods for academic performance in higher education using machine learning and learning management system data.

Authors: Albreiki B.; Zaki N.; Alashwal H.
Title: A systematic literature review of student performance prediction using machine learning
Abstract: The paper analyzes machine learning approaches for predicting student success and dropout risk in higher education.

Title: Predicting academic achievement with machine learning models
Abstract: The research compares classification algorithms for early identification of students at academic risk.

Title: Educational data mining: prediction of students academic performance
Abstract: The study applies machine learning methods to predict academic performance using demographic and activity variables.

Title: Student performance prediction using ensemble machine learning
Abstract: The article evaluates ensemble models for student grade prediction and compares accuracy and interpretability.

Title: The impact of engineering students performance using machine learning
Abstract: This work studies academic records and predictive factors associated with student achievement.

Title: Educational data mining and analysis of students academic performance
Abstract: The study uses classification techniques to detect academic risk and improve decision support in universities.
Source title: International Journal of Emerging Technologies in Learning

Title: Analyzing and predicting students performance by means of machine learning
Abstract: The paper presents a comparative analysis of supervised learning algorithms in educational contexts.

Title: Early segmentation of students according to academic performance
Abstract: The research uses predictive models to segment students and support timely academic interventions.

Title: Machine learning approaches for student academic performance prediction
Abstract: This article examines feature selection and predictive modeling for higher education analytics.

Title: Explainable artificial intelligence for student success prediction
Abstract: The paper studies explainable machine learning for predicting student success and improving institutional decisions.

Title: Predictive learning analytics in higher education using classification models
Abstract: The study explores classification models for academic performance prediction in online and blended learning environments.
